Introduction
Tell me about yourself and why this graduate role is the right next step.
Connect your degree, motivation, and relevant evidence to the role.
Recite every module without connecting it to the position.
Motivation
Why are you interested in this company specifically?
Give a reason connected to its work, customers, or the role.
Say it was simply the quickest application to submit.
Availability
When could you realistically start?
State an honest date and any genuine constraints.
Promise immediate availability regardless of existing commitments.
Behavioural
Tell me about a time you received difficult feedback.
Explain the feedback, your response, and what changed.
Claim you have never needed corrective feedback.
Salary
How would you discuss salary expectations at this stage?
Offer a researched range and consider the complete package.
Demand a number without understanding the role.
Candidate questions
What would you like to ask us?
Ask about expectations, the team, and the hiring process.
Say nothing because candidates should not ask questions.
